Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1B80 "BATTLEVALLEY-07DD-1B80" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07dd dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Battle Valley.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Moved some init code from $0380 to $07DD to ensure it was above the dump start address of $0400.
